taxonomy: Hypoporum gracile belongs to the family Hypoporidae and is classified as a species of moss. It is a type of crustose lichen, which is a group of fungi that grow on rocks and trees. The classification of Hypoporum gracile is further broken down into the kingdom Fungi, phylum Ascomycota, and class Lecanoromycetes. This classification is based on its characteristics and genetic makeup. Overall, Hypoporum gracile is a unique and fascinating organism that continues to be studied by scientists.
